title: PureBreed Chewy Roll Rawhide Dog Treat, Low in Fat, High in Protein
features: NATURAL TREAT: PureBreed rawhide roll provides a healthy chewing experience for dogs, made with high-quality rawhide material
NUTRITIONAL PROFILE: Low in fat and high in protein content, making it an excellent choice for weight-conscious dogs
DENTAL BENEFITS: Regular chewing helps maintain dental hygiene by reducing tartar build-up and promoting healthy gums
LONG-LASTING: Durable rawhide construction provides extended chewing entertainment and satisfaction for your pet
QUALITY ASSURANCE: Carefully crafted by PureBreed to ensure a safe and enjoyable treat that supports your dog's natural chewing instinct
description: Product description Treat your furry friend to the premium PureBreed Chewy Roll Rawhide dog treat that combines wholesome nutrition with satisfying chewing pleasure. This specially formulated rawhide roll is designed to be low in fat while maintaining high protein content, making it an excellent choice for health-conscious pet owners. The dense, chewy texture provides long-lasting entertainment while helping to promote dental hygiene through natural chewing action. Perfect for medium to large dogs, this rawhide roll offers a satisfying chewing experience that can help reduce boredom and destructive behaviour. The convenient roll shape makes it easy for dogs to grip and enjoy. Each roll is carefully crafted to ensure consistent quality and palatability. Keep in mind that supervision is recommended during treat time, and always ensure fresh water is available for your pet. Choose an appropriately sized treat for your dog's weight and chewing habits, and store in a cool, dry place to maintain freshness. Ingredients Meat and Animal Derivatives (48% Duck), Derivatives of Vegetable Origin, Cereals, Sorbitol, Salt. Analytical constituents: Crude Protein (10%), Crude Fat (1.5%). Crude Ash (8%), Crude Fibre (1.5%), Moisture (30%). Directions Pet Dog Treats Bites Dry Duck Cubes See more

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store In A Cool, Dry Place. Reseal Bag After Opening To Maintain Freshness
